description: Iron and Steel Mills of Ohio Cutting Wages Sharp Reductions in Prices of Finished Products Lead to Downward Revision of Mahoning Valley Pay Skilled 3Ien Hit First Small Plants Close ami Employees Accept Cut Rather Than Remain Idle Pptcial Iftspatch to The Tribut YOUNGSTOWN Ohio Dec 1Sharp reductions in prices of iron and steel products in the last month presage a wage revision in the industry accord ing to the belief in influential manu fscturing quarters This readjustment is already under way in the Mahoning Valley where the campaign to lower production costs is in full swing Revised wage rates doynward for employees in openhearth furnaces and plate mills are being worked out to become effective in some of the larger plants from December 1 Just how far reaching the wage re adjustment will become manufacturers re somewhat cautious to predict though it is the impression that a large body of employees in the industry will be affected Workers on the other hand have in many cases privately expressed the opinion that they would be willing to accept a reduction in wages if such procedure meant steadier and more regular employment Wage rates of certain employees who are naid more
